_comment: Binds the committed confidential SP1 guest ELFs to the verifying keys they must be deployed with. Two ELFs from one `cargo prove build`: elf/cxfer-guest (the settle guest → program_vkey, immutable PROGRAM_VKEY) and elf/reflection-prover (the Bitcoin-state relay prover → bitcoin_relay_vkey, immutable BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY). verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts both sha256s on every PR. A rebuild that changes either ELF MUST regenerate its vkey + update this file IN THE SAME COMMIT, then redeploy ConfidentialPool with the new immutable vkey — otherwise every settle (resp. every attestBitcoinStateProven) reverts. Each vkey is the key a REAL Groth16 proof of THAT ELF verifies against on-chain (test/ConfidentialSwapProofReal.t.sol, test/ConfidentialReflectionProofReal.t.sol). The two share cxfer-core, so a cxfer-core change rebuilds BOTH — committing the ELFs is what keeps the prover box running the pinned bytes rather than a drifting rebuild.
_vkey_authority: program_vkey + bitcoin_relay_vkey are the AUTHORITATIVE deploy vkeys for the committed ELFs; guest_state below is descriptive prose only (it has lagged the fields before). These four fields are the ONLY occurrences of those key names in this file — every history block uses deployed_*-prefixed names so it can never shadow them. The vkey<->ELF binding is enforced mechanically at prove time by the EXPECT_VKEY / ELF_VKEY_PIN guard in exec-prove.rs (program_vkey) and exec-reflect-prove.rs (bitcoin_relay_vkey), and at deploy time by DeployConfidentialPool's require(vkey == .program_vkey). After any ELF rebuild, derive both vkeys on the prover host and reconcile every field here in the same commit.
guest_state: Pre-freeze re-prove (branch confidential-transfer-nm): settle guest 0x00516e622d8fa554b8ef2c6cee2c3436aafda1a33b39f86a131072a7ae52e0ea (ELF sha 7b7a3f1ed6f07f6917e6a04cb44edc531e0a515aab917408f827bf1e04d77397, 918520 bytes) adds the OP_FARM_HARVEST witnessed reward_asset (escrow-mode farms back the reward note under an escrow asset; mint mode keeps debt_asset) on top of the farm settle ops + the §§1-3 relaxation + the adaptor/unwrap opening-sigmas; reflection guest 0x003ff6f92c41c5217f98c8e38c42d4ade7e2747c302d60dce6daa263a40716cb (ELF sha be3f8294b715e32d1fa261d215e99afb133abb1974f38128407b5393d9dbf9f4, 1067496 bytes) surfaces cbtcLocksRedeemed (the trustless cBTC escrow-claim gate; additive + digest-neutral, so conservation is unchanged). Real Groth16 fixtures for transfer/swap/lp/otc/bid/crosslane/reflection/reflection_burn_deposit regenerated from these ELFs and verify on-chain (test/*ProofReal.t.sol all green). Redeploy ConfidentialPool with both immutable vkeys. Mainnet re-anchor/re-prove remains a separate checklist.

_coordinated_reprove_2026_06_20.status: Both confidential ELFs rebuilt + canonical vkeys derived on the Vast prover box (RTX 4090). The AUTHORITATIVE results are the top-level program_vkey/bitcoin_relay_vkey + sha256 fields above (an earlier same-day settle build was superseded by the committed one described in guest_state). Real Groth16 fixtures regenerated and green (test/*ProofReal.t.sol).
_coordinated_reprove_2026_06_20.remaining: exec_confidential (the settle prover host) does NOT yet serialize OP_FARM_BOND/HARVEST/UNBOND, so a full farm-op settle groth16 prove is pending the host serializer (the dapp witness builder is dapp/confidential-farm.js, byte-validated by tests/farm-settle-parity.mjs). Reflection ops + the existing settle ops prove under the pinned vkeys today; the pinned settle vkey is already valid for the farm ops (per-ELF). Regenerate the Groth16 settle fixtures from the committed ELF before redeploying.

_deployed_onchain_sepolia_e2_2026_06_19.status: Currently LIVE on Sepolia/signet (the FINALIZED E2 pilot re-prove, 2026-06-19) — to be SUPERSEDED by the authoritative top-level vkeys on the next ConfidentialPool redeploy. The deployed_* keys below are renamed so they never collide with the authoritative fields that verify-vkey-pin.sh / DeployConfidentialPool read; they are a record of what is on-chain now, NOT deploy targets.
_deployed_onchain_sepolia_e2_2026_06_19.reflection_note: Deployed reflection leg is the multi-live-spend skip-not-panic rebuild; the intermediate BIP141 + Mode-B reflection vkey 0x0006921c / ELF sha f66eb9d8 / 980816 bytes was superseded and is NOT a committed ELF.
_deployed_onchain_sepolia_e2_2026_06_19.mainnet_note: Mainnet re-anchor/re-prove remains separate in ops/CHECKLIST-mainnet-reprove.md.
